default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and potential case studies for Hypermode, considering the upcoming end of their contract with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hypermode's contract with GrowthX is ending soon; no immediate plans to extend](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Limited customer base for case studies (fewer than 5-6 ideal candidates)](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Shift in focus: Exploring CEO thought leadership content for Kevin on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Potential for future collaboration on LinkedIn audience growth and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Status and Limitations

  - [Few existing case studies: Pick Your Packer (startup), DeGraph (open-source project)](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - Limited customer base for creating new case studies (\< 5-6 ideal candidates)
  - [Upcoming blog post for Pick Your Packer product launch (4-8 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [DeGraph: Open-source project, not primary IP for Hypermode](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Shifting product focus: Building on DeGraph for new project launch (next year)](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Alternative Content Strategies

  - [User stories: Leverage existing customers for specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Technical/developer content performing well](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [CEO thought leadership content for Kevin on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
      - [Leverage Kevin's existing following and developer space credibility](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
      - [Focus on shorter, casual content series](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
      - [Key content types: Social proof, pain point content, momentum content](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

### Social Proof and Audience Growth

  - [Cherry-pick testimonials for social proof](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Leverage network connections for prestige augmentation](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Automated LinkedIn connections for waitlist signups](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Potential for LinkedIn audience growth automation (future consideration)](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

### Content Workflow Considerations

  - [GrowthX team to discuss separate workflow for thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Explore workflow for pain point content creation](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Investigate LinkedIn connection scraping for social proof content](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Discuss thought leadership content strategy during weekly meeting](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [GrowthX to internally review potential for LinkedIn audience growth and thought leadership workflows](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Consider repositioning existing case study content for short-term use](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Hypermode to continue in-house audience growth efforts via waitlist signups](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Revisit collaboration possibilities for future engagement after current contract ends](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
